title: The State Armed Police Forces (Extension of Laws) Act, 1952
full_text: The State Armed Police Forces (Extension of Laws) Act, 1952 राज्‍य सशस्‍त्र पुलिस बल (विधियों का विस्‍तारण)अधिनियम, 1952 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1952-63 Act Number: 63 Enactment Date: 1952-08-22 Act Year: 1952 Short Title: The State Armed Police Forces (Extension of Laws) Act, 1952 Hindi Title: राज्‍य सशस्‍त्र पुलिस बल (विधियों का विस्‍तारण)अधिनियम, 1952 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of disciplinary laws in force in any State relating to the armed police force of that State to members of the said force when serving outside that State. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The State Armed Police Forces (Extension of Laws) Act, 1952 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. Extension of disciplinary laws of any State to members of the armed police force of that State when serving outside that State. Section 4. Power to add to, or omit from, the Schedule. Schedule 1.
